arts.ttl: Why Vinicius Jr is a worry for Real Madrid
arts.sum: Yet, he has only scored in five league games at the Bernabéu this season : against Espanyol, Villarreal, Osasuna (where he netted his hat-trick), Girona, and Rayo Vallecano. Last season, he scored 15 La Liga goals, nine of them at home across seven matches.

arts.ttl: Club World Cup prize money: How much Chelsea, Man City & Real Madrid could make
arts.sum: The six South American participants will earn $15.2m each, while clubs from Africa, Asia and North and Central America will take home $9.55m just for qualifying. FIFA have confirmed the distribution of prize money and appearance fees for this summer's month-long tournament in the United States, with 32 clubs reaping the lucrative rewards after qualifying for the inter-continental competition.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Leganes – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid can move level on points with leaders Barcelona in La Liga with a victory over Leganes on Saturday evening. The Spanish champions return to action at the Bernabeu against the relegation-threatened visitors. Barcelona moved three points clear after beating Osasuna on Thursday night, increasing the pressure on Carlo Ancelotti’s side. arts.sum: Meanwhile, Modric and Camavinga step up as the midfield duo, orchestrating play for a team that will feature three of the Fantastic Four in attack. On the other hand, Brahim is set to start, while doubts remain over Alaba.
